positive: Minimalist abstract celestial map of a smiling crescent moon and a scattered nebula cloud in deep indigo and ethereal gold tones. The style should be elegant, vector-illustration inspired, with clean, bold linework and sophisticated negative space. The composition is centered, featuring geometric constellations connecting the celestial bodies. High contrast, dramatic gradient wash background, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Symmetry is key. --ar 1:1 --v 5.1 --style raw
